coursesPage.heroTitle: Discover courses tailored to your path
coursesPage.heroSubtitle: Browse the catalog, filter by level, and find content you can start learning right away.
coursesPage.emptyEnrolled: You haven't enrolled in any course yet.
coursesPage.emptyEnrolledHint: Explore the quality courses below and start your learning journey today!

reviews.heading: Learner reviews
reviews.emptyHint: Be the first to share your thoughts on this course.

reportDialog.title: Report course
reportDialog.description: This report will be sent to admins for review. Please describe the problem clearly.
reportDialog.contentPlaceholder: Describe the issue you experienced while taking this course.

myCourses.title: Your courses
myCourses.subtitle: Manage, track progress, and continue your learning journey here.
myCourses.emptyDesc: You don't own any courses yet. Explore our quality catalog and start conquering your goals today!

features.certificateDesc: Get a certificate when you complete

courseCard.loginRequired: Please sign in to add items to your cart

courseDetail.notFoundDesc: This course may have been removed or does not exist.

lessons.lockedNotice: Buy the course to unlock all content

finalTest.description: Complete this test to confirm you've mastered the material.

reports.empty: You have not reported any issues for this course yet.

toasts.loginRequiredCart: Please sign in to add items to your cart
toasts.loginRequiredBuy: Please sign in to buy this course

hero.title: Online Classroom
hero.subtitle: Watch videos, discuss, and review your enrolled courses.

courseOverview.emptyState: Pick a course and a lesson to see the overview.
courseOverview.progressPercentDone: You have completed {{percent}}% of this course.
courseOverview.whatYouLearnDesc: Use the lesson list on the right to navigate through each piece of detailed content. Each lesson may include video, downloadable materials, and a Q&A area where you can interact with the community.

syllabusSidebar.title: List of Lessons
syllabusSidebar.empty: This course has no lessons yet.

courseReviews.emptyData: No review data for this course yet.
courseReviews.heading: Course reviews
courseReviews.noResults: No reviews match the current filter.

lessonComments.heading: Q&A / Lesson comments
lessonComments.subtitle: Ask questions or discuss this lesson's content.
lessonComments.placeholder: Ask a question or share your thoughts...
lessonComments.hint: Please keep comments polite and focused on the lesson content.
lessonComments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to ask a question!

videoSection.noVideoFallback: This lesson has no video. Read the detailed description below.
videoSection.selectLessonDesc: Pick a lesson from the list to see the detailed content.
videoSection.noComments: No comments yet for this lesson. Be the first!
videoSection.pickLessonPrompt: Please pick a lesson on the right column to start learning.

lessonTestRunner.authRequired: Please sign in to take this test.
lessonTestRunner.startFailed: Could not start the test. Please try again.
lessonTestRunner.submitFailed: Could not submit. Please check your connection and try again.
lessonTestRunner.timeUp: Time's up! Your work will be submitted automatically.
lessonTestRunner.loadFailedDesc: This test isn't ready yet, or an error occurred while loading data.
lessonTestRunner.noQuestionsTitle: This test has no questions yet
lessonTestRunner.noQuestionsDesc: Please contact your instructor for support.
lessonTestRunner.introDesc: Complete the test below to reinforce what you learned. Read the instructions carefully before starting.

instructions.noRefresh: Do not refresh the page while taking the test — progress may be lost.
instructions.navigate: You can move between questions and flag any question for review.
instructions.submitHint: Press <0>"Submit"</0> when done. The system will auto-submit when time runs out.

lessonTestRunner.noOptions: This question has no options to display.
lessonTestRunner.questionBoardHint: Click a number to jump to that question.
lessonTestRunner.confirmSubmitDesc: Please review your work before submitting:
lessonTestRunner.confirmUnansweredWarn: You still have {{count}} unanswered question(s). Make sure you want to submit.
lessonTestRunner.passedDesc: You have completed this test. Continue with the next lesson.
lessonTestRunner.failedDesc: The passing score is {{percent}}%. Review and try again.
lessonTestRunner.detailsSubtitle: Review each question and the correct answer to reinforce your knowledge.
